languages.text: {n}Эоганн улыбается.{/n} "В этом нет нужды, досточтимый коллега. Каждый из нас рано или поздно встречается с лимитами своих функций, в этом нет ничего постыдного. Однако, если Вольный Торговец позволит, я готов взять на себя бремя, которое не по силе тебе".

traits.locale_text: {n}Эоганн улыбается.{/n} "В этом нет нужды, досточтимый коллега. Каждый из нас рано или поздно встречается с лимитами своих функций, в этом нет ничего постыдного. Однако, если Вольный Торговец позволит, я готов взять на себя бремя, которое не по силе тебе".

languages.text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн улыбается.{/n} "В этом нет нужды, досточтимый коллега. Каждый из нас рано или поздно встречается с лимитами своих функций, в этом нет ничего постыдного. Однако, если Вольный Торговец позволит, я готов взять на себя бремя, которое не по силе тебе".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."

{n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."

{n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sonríe.{/n} «No es necesario, mi estimado colega. Tarde o temprano, todos nos encontramos con los límites de nuestra funcionalidad, no es nada de lo que avergonzarse. Sin embargo, si {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente lo permite, me ocuparé yo de esa labor que le supera».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sonríe.{/n} «No es necesario, mi estimado colega. Tarde o temprano, todos nos encontramos con los límites de nuestra funcionalidad, no es nada de lo que avergonzarse. Sin embargo, si {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente lo permite, me ocuparé yo de esa labor que le supera».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡笑了。{/n}“大可不必如此，尊敬的同僚。你我迟早都会触及自身功能的极限，这没什么可羞耻的。不过，若行商浪人准许，我十分乐意替你扛起那些超出你能力范畴的重担。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡笑了。{/n}“大可不必如此，尊敬的同僚。你我迟早都会触及自身功能的极限，这没什么可羞耻的。不过，若行商浪人准许，我十分乐意替你扛起那些超出你能力范畴的重担。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sourit.{/n} « C'est inutile, honorable collègue. Nous finissons tous par atteindre nos limites, il n'y a aucune honte à cela. Cependant, avec la permission {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, laissez-moi vous soulager de votre fardeau. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sourit.{/n} « C'est inutile, honorable collègue. Nous finissons tous par atteindre nos limites, il n'y a aucune honte à cela. Cependant, avec la permission {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, laissez-moi vous soulager de votre fardeau. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn gülümsüyor.{/n} "Buna hiç gerek yok saygıdeğer meslektaşım. Hepimiz er ya da geç işlevlerimizin sınırlarıyla karşılaşırız. Bunda utanılacak bir şey yok. Ancak Hür Tacir izin verirse buradaki herkesi aşan yükleri omuzlamaya hazırım."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn gülümsüyor.{/n} "Buna hiç gerek yok saygıdeğer meslektaşım. Hepimiz er ya da geç işlevlerimizin sınırlarıyla karşılaşırız. Bunda utanılacak bir şey yok. Ancak Hür Tacir izin verirse buradaki herkesi aşan yükleri omuzlamaya hazırım."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lächelt.{/n} "Das ist nicht nötig, geschätzter Kollege. Jeder von uns gelangt früher oder später an seine Grenzen, das ist kein Grund, sich zu schämen. Aber wenn es {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} gestattet, bin ich bereit, Lasten zu tragen, die Eure Kräfte übersteigen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lächelt.{/n} "Das ist nicht nötig, geschätzter Kollege. Jeder von uns gelangt früher oder später an seine Grenzen, das ist kein Grund, sich zu schämen. Aber wenn es {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} gestattet, bin ich bereit, Lasten zu tragen, die Eure Kräfte übersteigen."

languages.text: {n}エオグンが微笑む。{/n}「そんな心配はいりません、尊敬する同僚。いずれは職務の限界に達するものです。恥じることではありません。しかし、もしよろしければ、私があなたの肩の荷を担う用意があります。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "There is no need for that, esteemed colleague. Each of us sooner or later meets the limits of our functions, there is no shame in that. However, if the Rogue Trader will permit, I am willing to shoulder burdens that are beyond you."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオグンが微笑む。{/n}「そんな心配はいりません、尊敬する同僚。いずれは職務の限界に達するものです。恥じることではありません。しかし、もしよろしければ、私があなたの肩の荷を担う用意があります。」
